title: Bump tactus to v0.46.4 in pyproject and lambda requirements, regenerate lock, run lambda smoke tests

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Updated dependency pins: pyproject.toml tactus ^0.46.4 and score-processor-lambda/requirements.txt tactus==0.46.4. Regenerated poetry.lock (tactus now locked to 0.46.4). Ran lambda container smoke test via make test-smoke in score-processor-lambda: PASS (10 passed, 0 failed).
